concerns.text: SC-003 requires measuring the 'retention rate of distinct logical rules' in Co-evolving vs Mixed-task conditions. No task exists to calculate, store, or compare these raw retention rates; T027 only implements ANOVA on forgetting rates, leaving SC-003 unimplemented.

SC-004 mandates N ≥ 30 runs per condition for statistical power. T028 describes 'implementing data aggregation logic' but lacks a specific task to validate that the N=30 threshold was actually met before proceeding to analysis, making the success criterion unverifiable by the task list alone.

FR-002 requires a training loop enforcing a fixed budget of rule evaluations with exact parity. T021 places this logic in 'src/cli.py' (the runner) rather than within the agent training loop itself, risking undetected drift during execution before the CLI aggregates results.

FR-006 explicitly requires 'one-way ANOVA' (or Kruskal-Wallis). The plan and T027 reference 'Mixed-Design ANOVA', which is statistically distinct and unsupported by the independent agent run design. No task exists to implement the correct one-way ANOVA specified in the FR.
